markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content workflow, CMS process, and project plan.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workflow Integration:** GrowthX will handle most content production steps, but Netwrix must provide final author approval to ensure accuracy and ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Sanity CMS Bottleneck:** The Sanity CMS is a major bottleneck (e.g., one article took 3 hours to stage), risking the project's ability to publish enough content to test performance.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** GrowthX will target "white space" keywords to avoid overlap with Netwrix's existing content bank, focusing on the "one secure" narrative and cross-sell opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [**Project Plan:** The 8-week plan starts with strategy, moves to calibration articles, and ramps up to 5 articles/week, with GrowthX handling all Sanity staging.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Keyword Alignment

  - [**Goal:** Avoid content overlap between GrowthX and Netwrix teams.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
    1.  [GrowthX delivers a content strategy with topics and keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
    2.  [Netwrix reviews the strategy against its existing content bank.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
    3.  [Netwrix approves topics for production.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Netwrix POC:** Ralf will be the approver while Mariel is on PTO.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:** GrowthX will perform targeted updates on existing content, not full rewrites, to improve SEO without discarding prior research.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

### Workflow & Approval Process

  - [**Current Netwrix Workflow:** A multi-stage process ensures technical accuracy and brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Outline → Copy → SEO Review → Content Manager Review → Tone/Voice Review → PMM Review → Staging → Final Review → Publish.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**GrowthX Integration:** GrowthX will manage most production steps (SEO, PMM, copy), leaving Netwrix responsible for:](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Author Approval:** Required for all articles to ensure ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [**Final Review:** A quick check before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Target Review Time:** 24 hours from staging to publish, a critical goal for the project's velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Sanity CMS Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** The Sanity CMS is slow and difficult to use, creating a major bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Example:** One article with code snippets took 3 hours to stage.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Impact:** This inefficiency risks the project's ability to publish enough content to test performance and gather data within the 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will investigate ways to streamline the Sanity workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### Project Plan & Logistics

  - [**8-Week Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Wk 1:** Kickoff & Discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [**Wk 2:** Deliver strategy & keywords for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Wk 3:** Lock strategy; produce 1 calibration article for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [**Wk 4:** Publish calibration article; produce 3 more for quality check.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
      - [**Wk 6–8:** Ramp up production to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [**CMS Access:** GrowthX requires Sanity access to stage articles.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
      - [**Blocker:** James (on PTO until next Thursday) is the only one who can grant access.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
      - [**Timeline:** This is not a blocker for the initial strategy phase.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [**Image Production:** GrowthX designers will create images using Netwrix's photography guide.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Translations:** Netwrix requires content translation for 6 languages (Spanish, German, Portuguese, Korean, Japanese, Chinese).](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Internal links must be searched for within Sanity to ensure they resolve to the correct localized page URL.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mariel:**](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [Record and share a video walkthrough of the Sanity translation process.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [Share the photography guide with the GrowthX design team.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Philipp:**](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [Follow up with James to grant Sanity access to GrowthX upon his return.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Kathy:**](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Deliver the initial content strategy and keyword list for review next week.](https://fathom.video/share/owK6j38VoxkMKtiX3ome5C9ZSpBvquqV?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
